title: Intensely Sweet Brazilian Peanut Bars
description: A sweet and shattering Brazilian dish featuring peanut brittle, these bars are perfect for an energizing snack, and with macrobiotic-friendly ingredients, they can be enjoyed by everyone. The combination of peanuts and sugar creates a deliciously sweet treat.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Line an 8 inch square baking dish with parchment paper.
In a large saucepan, combine the sugar, corn syrup, and water, and place over medium heat.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to medium low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the peanuts, butter, vanilla extract, and sea salt until the peanuts are fully coated.
Pour the peanut mixture into the prepared baking dish and spread it out evenly.
Allow the mixture to cool and set at room temperature for at least 30 minutes.
Once set, use a sharp knife to cut the peanut mixture into bars.
Serve the bars immediately, or store them in an airtight container for up to 5 days.
